semantic.role: Package entry point (barrel) that aggregates and re-exports the public API of the ArchSpine governance library.
responsibilities: Serve as the primary import target for consumers of the ArchSpine package, providing a single entry point for the public API.
Re-export the CheckService class and runCheck function from the check-service module, enabling CLI commands, MCP tools, and service orchestration to import them from one location.
Re-export the ValidationSummary type from the validate task module, allowing clients to type-check validation results without importing internal task modules.
outOfScope: This file does not implement any business logic, analysis, or orchestration—it only re-exports symbols.
It does not perform any transformations, validations, or state management.
invariants: Must only contain re-exports; no new symbol definitions, side effects, or logic.
Should not import CLI or presentation layers to maintain separation of concerns.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean, minimal public surface for the ArchSpine library by bundling essential governance symbols into a single entry point.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Align with ArchSpine v1.0.0 release by stabilizing the public API surface and ensuring only the intended symbols (CheckService, runCheck, ValidationSummary) are exported.

publicSurface.description: Service class that orchestrates architecture rule checking across the codebase. Called by CLI commands, MCP tools, and the sync service to execute validation scans.
Function that runs a single architecture rule validation against a given context and returns a structured result. Used internally by CheckService and the fix service for single-rule execution.

Type definition for the summary result of a validation pass, including counts of violations, warnings, errors, and overall pass/fail status. Consumed by output renderers, view services, and CI integrations.
